ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "minor" TEXT /* Minor field of study, if applicable */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the student's account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "prospectus_description" TEXT /* Description of the prospectus for the project */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract summarizing the project */,
  "prospectus_link" TEXT /* Link to the prospectus document */,
  "project_link" TEXT /* Link to the complete project document */,
  "secondary_file" TEXT /* Path to any secondary files related to the project */,
  "cp_courses" TEXT /* Courses that contributed to the capstone project */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor assigned to the project */,
  "additional_information" TEXT /* Additional comments or information regarding the project */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the project was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the advisor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code representing the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., prospectus, final project) */,
  "file_link" TEXT /* Link to the file location */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abstracts" (
  "abstract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abstract */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the abstract */,
  "abstract_text" TEXT /* Text of the abstract */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the abstract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abstract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abstracts_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prospectuses" (
  "prospectus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prospectus */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the prospectus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text of the prospectus */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the prospectus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prospectus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prospectuses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the analytics */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the project has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads the project has received */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date of the analytics record */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views for the project */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the discussion */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the forum post */,
  "posted_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who posted the message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date of the post */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_forums_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, advisor, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the review */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advisor who provided the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the project (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_reviews_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_members" TEXT /* List of team members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
